description: Wave 5: Cross-faction comparison pairs + edge cases. Same role across factions, deliberate style boundary tests.
style_prefix: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background
negative: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

subjects.prompt: human male Compact infantry soldier in his 30s in a charcoal armored assault suit with ceramic plate inserts, steel-blue shoulder flash, regulation energy sidearm, combat boots, the suit is maintained to regulation standard with some field patching, he stands at attention like someone who follows orders without question, everything is rectangular stamped pressed machine-made

tall broad reptilian alien Veshan warrior in dark green-grey overlapping scales with heavy brow ridges and amber slit-pupil eyes, bony crest ridge, thick tail, wearing dark bronze forged plate armor shaped to follow natural scale ridges with visible hammer marks, crimson house sash, a heavy blade at the hip, the armor shows intentional imperfections, aggressive forward lean, everything is triangular angular forged

lean human male Sable Reach fighter in his 30s wearing mismatched salvaged armor — a Compact chest plate spray-painted black strapped over a Veshan leather vest, one Compact boot one civilian boot, an improvised weapon made from hull scrap, a faction brand on his neck, everything is asymmetric irregular stolen nothing matches, he fights because fighting is how you eat in the Reach

human female Compact medic in a cream medical coat over charcoal undersuit, stethoscope, compact trauma pack, red cross insignia, regulation shoes, everything clean maintained institutional, the coat is worn from autoclave cycles but kept spotless deliberately

female reptilian alien Veshan wound-tender with amber-brown scales and a smooth crest, wearing dark leather with bronze medical implements hanging from a belt — bone-setting tools, suture clamps, a poultice pouch, the medical tools are forged metal not stamped plastic, she treats warriors after battle and her leather apron is permanently stained with blood that will not wash out

human woman serving as Sable Reach medic wearing a torn Compact medical coat now grey over a salvaged thermal undersuit, a medical kit held together with tape, hand-painted red cross on the sleeve, reused surgical gloves, no license no credentials just knowledge and willingness, the coat was stolen from a supply shipment

human female Compact ship captain in her 50s wearing a navy bridge coat with tarnished gold shoulder boards over steel-blue uniform, document case, polished scuffed boots, the coat shows decades of corridors and command, institutional authority at its peak

massive reptilian alien Veshan ship-lord with dark scales and an ancestral crest-cap, wearing heavy ceremonial plate armor with house heraldry, a blood-crimson cloak, no visible weapon because the ship is the weapon, the armor has been passed down and repaired across generations

human female Sable Reach pirate captain in her 50s wearing a stolen Compact navy coat with the insignia ripped off and replaced with bronze clasps taken from a Veshan officer, concealed armor underneath, an ornate stolen pistol, her crew dresses in echo of her navy-and-bronze palette, she built this from nothing

human male Compact deckhand in charcoal thermal undersuit with cargo harness and mag-lock boots, ship ID tag, dosimeter badge, faded from decon cycles, standard issue anonymous replaceable, the machine stamps them out and the machine will stamp out another when this one wears out

young reptilian alien Veshan laborer with olive scales and a small crest, wearing basic cured leather work harness with bronze tool clips shaped for clawed hands, leather foot wraps around digitigrade feet, carrying a heavy forged tool for hull maintenance, even the lowest Veshan worker uses hand-forged tools not mass-produced ones

thin human male Sable Reach dock laborer wearing whatever he could find — a torn thermal top, rope-belted canvas trousers, one work glove, wrapped feet, carrying a manual loading hook, no ID no badge no dosimeter no safety equipment, if he gets hurt nobody is filing a report

human male Compact officer in formal dress uniform — deep navy jacket with gold frogging across the chest, high stiff collar, gold cuff rings, white gloves, polished shoes, a ceremonial sword at the hip, this is the one time a Compact officer looks impressive instead of institutional, but the uniform still has that machine-pressed rectangular quality

tall reptilian alien Veshan in full ceremonial armor — black iron ancestral plate with gold and crimson enamel depicting battle victories, a tall decorated crest-cap, a blood-crimson formal cloak trimmed in gold, honor tokens polished for once, this is a house celebration and even the armor looks like it has been cleaned, which for a Veshan is the equivalent of a formal suit

human male Sable Reach captain wearing his version of dressed up — his cleanest stolen shirt, his best trophy armor polished with engine grease, his most impressive weapon displayed prominently, a scrap of silk scarf tied at the throat that he clearly took from someone wealthy, his boots are actually both from the same pair for once, this is as good as it gets in the Reach

human wearing a perfectly integrated outfit that smoothly combines Compact steel-blue rectangular fabric with Veshan crimson triangular bronze plates and Orryn teal elliptical circuit-woven panels and Keth amber organic bio-film accents, the outfit looks designer and intentional and harmonious, as if someone created a fashion line that blends all four faction aesthetics into one coherent garment, nothing is torn nothing is stolen nothing is improvised it was designed this way

human wearing a plain grey jumpsuit with no patches no insignia no tools no belt no harness no visible wear no cultural markers no faction colors no material vocabulary, the jumpsuit could belong to any civilization or none, there is nothing to identify what culture produced this garment or what role this person fills, it is a blank default human in a blank default outfit

wealthy human executive in a tailored charcoal suit with subtle shimmer fabric, polished leather shoes, a gold wristwatch, a slim elegant data tablet, perfectly groomed hair, the suit has no patches no wear no stains, the fabric is expensive and smooth, this person has never loaded cargo or fixed a reactor or worn a pressure suit, this is corporate luxury not working-class space
